footer.tagline: Mapping Italy's artistic realities: nomadic, settled and vanished.

home.title: We map Italy's
home.lead: A living archive of collectives, spaces and movements — nomadic, rooted or vanished — that shaped the Italian cultural landscape.

mapping.title: Mapping
mapping.desc: A cartography of artistic realities across Italy, categorised by type and status.

community.title: Community
community.desc: We connect artists, curators and enthusiasts to build a network of sharing and mutual support.

stories.title: Stories
stories.desc: Articles, interviews and insights into the realities that animate — or once animated — the Italian art scene.

about.title: About
about.seoDesc: Il Bel Paese: the first mapping, promotion and research platform that legitimises Italys independent artistic realities.
about.p1_html: Il Bel Paese is the first mapping, promotion and research platform that legitimises independent Italian artistic and project-based realities.
about.p2_html: Through a dynamic showcase and a historical archive, the project systematises these experiences to foster networks and shorten the distance between the independent scene and the institutional system.
about.p3: We believe independent realities — physical spaces, those without a venue, and those no longer in existence — are a collective cultural heritage that deserves recognition, memory and tools to dialogue with the rest of the art system.
about.missionDesc: To legitimise, network and give voice to Italys independent artistic realities through mapping, promotion and research.
about.visionDesc: An ecosystem where independent scene and institutional world meet as equals, recognising one another as part of the same cultural landscape.

indie.title: Independent realities
indie.desc: Spaces, collectives, itinerant projects and archives looking for visibility and connections.

researchers.title: Researchers & curators
researchers.desc: Scholars, critics and cultural workers who need data and context.

institutions.title: Institutions & partners
institutions.desc: Bodies, academies and organisations wanting to engage with the independent scene.

what.title: What We
what.intro: Our work unfolds across three pillars — mapping, promotion and research — designed to legitimise the independent scene and connect it with the institutional system.
what.intro_html: Our work unfolds across three pillars — mapping, promotion and research — designed to legitimise the independent scene and connect it with the institutional system.
what.seoDesc: Mapping, promotion and research: the three pillars through which Il Bel Paese legitimises the Italian independent art scene.

mapping.title: Mapping
mapping.desc: We identify and categorise Italys independent artistic realities into three families: Spaces (with a physical venue), Spaces without a space (itinerant, digital, nomadic) and Spaces that were (historical archive of concluded experiences).

promotion.title: Promotion
promotion.desc: We give visibility to mapped realities through a dynamic showcase, an editorial magazine and an open replies space where different voices debate the themes of the independent scene.

research.title: Research
research.desc: We conduct research, gather data and produce content to read and tell the transformations of the Italian art scene.

methodDescs.listen: We identify realities through tip-offs, field research and direct dialogue with the scene.
methodDescs.map: We verify, geolocate and categorise each experience according to shared criteria.
methodDescs.tell: We publish profiles, articles and debates to give context and visibility.
methodDescs.update: Annual review of the status of mapped realities to keep the data alive.

what.whyText: Because independent realities often fly under the radar of institutions, official databases and funding routes. Documenting them, telling their stories and connecting them means restoring the legitimacy they deserve and enriching the country cultural heritage.
what.ctaText: If you represent an independent artistic reality, are a researcher or an institutional partner, write to us to join the map or the magazine.

showcase.title: Dynamic showcase
showcase.desc: Up-to-date profiles, filters by region, medium and type, community-sourced submissions.

archive.title: Historical archive
archive.desc: Memory of concluded realities, recovered through testimonies and documents.

magazine.title: Editorial magazine
magazine.desc: Articles, interviews and the replies-between-authors format with editors-in-chief as scientific guarantee.

update.title: Lets update
update.desc: Annual review of the status of mapped realities to keep the data alive.

map.title: Mapping
map.lead: Explore the Italian independent scene. Filter by section, region or artistic medium.
map.empty: No realities match the selected filters.

magazine.title: The
magazine.lead: Articles, interviews, investigations and debates on the Italian independent art scene.
